name: Rithm Capital Corp. 6.375% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Rithm Capital Corp. 6.375% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a class of preferred stock issued by Rithm Capital Corp. These shares pay a cumulative dividend, have a fixed-to-floating interest rate structure, and holders have preferential rights in liquidation. Further information can be found in the company's filings.
